title: arenaria gothica var. fugax
intro: Arenaria gothica var. fugax, also known as the white sandwort or pygmy sandwort, is a rare, flowering plant that belongs to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and possessing antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, Arenaria gothica var. fugax is often used as an ingredient in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
